title: lepisorus neovenosus
intro: Lepisorus neovenosus, also known as the Chinese Leptosorus, is a type of plant in the family Polypodiaceae, which is a genus of ferns commonly found in China. The medicinal properties of Lepisorus neovenosus include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat conditions such as arthritis, kidney stones, and urinary tract infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Lepisorus neovenosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules for medicinal use, with some traditional Chinese medicine practitioners also using it in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
